role: A right-rail React region that renders the composed address-help bundle for the currently indicated ui:// element, surfacing what-it-is, how-to-use it, and how-to-change it with a presentation-preference feedback loop.
capabilities: Render composed address help for an indicated ui:// locus
Consume backend bundle (address_help) and avoid duplicating backend composition logic
Degrade cleanly across five states: all legs present, thin howto, no-code scope, unregistered element, and malformed/fetch error
Lead with plain-language what + how-to-use and demote mechanism to a collapsible drill-down
Display a learned-preference marker and directive when a presentation_pref exists
Model-free structural adapt: hoist the how-to-change drill-down open when lead_with:change is learned
Provide an in-system feedback affordance via ShapeHow to set presentation preferences
Summarize blast-radius reach by relationship kind with expandable member lists
Surface loading, error, and empty states without blank renders
Self-register as a guidable element via data-ui-ref
substance_why: The file implements a complete multi-state renderer, local toggle state, preference adapt logic, blast-radius summarization, and a wired feedback child, all backed by detailed behavioral comments.
interactions_present: Indicated ui:// locus change drives panel content via AppContext
Toggle the 'how to change it' mechanism drill-down open/closed via button
Expand/collapse each blast-radius relationship kind to show member symbols
Submit a presentation-preference shape via ShapeHow (onShape -> setPresentationPrefAt)
interactions_missing: No retry or dismiss action for malformed/unresolvable addresses
No click-through or copy action on file paths in the change scope
No in-panel action to register an unregistered element or author a missing howto
No keyboard shortcuts or focus management for the drill-down or reach lists
No reset/clear preference affordance is visible in this file
performance_risks: Blast-radius member arrays and change.scope are rendered fully when expanded, with no virtualization or truncation for very large corpora
Derived values (leg counts, hoist logic, represents parsing) are recomputed on every render without memoization
Each new indication triggers a backend fetch and full re-render of the panel and its nested reach trees
reuse_why: The state machine, degradation rules, altitude concept, and preference loop are worth preserving, but the component should be split and its styling/structure rebuilt for the redesign.
decomposition_hints: Extract BlastReach + ReachKind into a dedicated blast-radius summary component/file
Extract the mechanism drill-down into a MechanismDrillDown sub-component owning its open-state logic
Extract pure helpers (shortAddr, representsLabel) and the five-state decision tree into a small utility/hook
Keep ShapeHow as a separate feedback component but clarify its contract and busy/error states
Separate the AddressHelp shell (data fetch/lifecycle) from the presentation layers (lead, mechanism, feedback)
